purpose: Define complete ArchMap acceptance as a v1 output replacement corpus across typed evaluator results, spectrum, homotopy, structural reading, strict-distance guardrails, stale-artifact suppression, and FieldSig handoff refs.

legacyFixtureBoundary.reason: legacy v0 packet equality is quarantined and is not current ArchSig v1 output replacement completion evidence

acceptance: positive cases emit v1 typed evaluator, distance, summary, viewer, manifest, and raw packet surfaces when requested
negative cases stop before measured output or report bounded incomplete measurement
strict-distance rejects missing profile and blocked typed support
stale success artifacts are removed before validation failure returns
practical example asserts diagnostic value rather than smoke-only execution
nonConclusions: corpus does not claim complete repository discovery
corpus does not prove architecture lawfulness
corpus does not treat schema-only or legacy v0 helper fields as measured evidence
